report_name: Ukraine Reportedly Strikes Crimea Titan Plant, Expanding Campaign to Russia's Industrial War Supply Chain

threat_actors.name: Ukraine's Unmanned Systems Forces
threat_actors.description: The state military force of Ukraine that reportedly conducted a drone strike against the Crimea Titan industrial plant to disrupt Russia's war supply chain.
threat_actors.goals: To disrupt the Russian war economy by targeting key industrial inputs, thereby hampering the production of military equipment.

attack_patterns.name: Search Open Technical Databases
attack_patterns.description: Used by Ukrainian forces to gather intelligence on the Crimea Titan plant's role in the Russian military supply chain to identify it as a critical target.

attack_patterns.name: Damage to Property
attack_patterns.description: The drone strike on the Crimea Titan plant caused physical damage to the industrial facility, leading to the suspension of production.

attack_patterns.name: Loss of Availability
attack_patterns.description: The strike on the Crimea Titan plant was intended to cause a loss of availability by suspending production of critical chemicals for Russia's war effort.

identities.name: Crimea Titan
identities.description: An industrial plant in Armyansk, Crimea, that produces titanium dioxide and other chemicals for Russia's military-industrial complex. It was targeted by a Ukrainian strike.

identities.name: Russia
identities.description: The state whose military-industrial complex and war supply chain were targeted by the Ukrainian strike on the Crimea Titan plant.
